description: Machine-readable manifest of the ClawDoc public repository contents. ClawDoc is a dual-mode OpenClaw system doctor distribution supporting two install modes: Mode 1 (persistent dedicated agent) and Mode 2 (skills-only into an existing agent).

reference_docs_definition.includes_mdx: yes — includes *.mdx files such as railway.mdx

skills.description: Public openclaw-* skills shipped with ClawDoc. All SKILL.md files have name + description frontmatter only. 'triggers' are embedded inline in description, not a separate frontmatter key.
skills.forbidden_note: Any skills/ directory containing 'clawdoc-' that is NOT 'clawdoc-onboarding' is private and must not appear in the public repo.

public_template_files.description: Approved public template files that are NOT forbidden. Only these paths are allowed.
public_template_files.note: Root-level USER.md, IDENTITY.md, TOOLS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, MEMORY.md, AGENTS.md are always forbidden unless explicitly listed above. Root-level SOUL.md is allowed only if it is the public ClawDoc persona already tracked in origin/master. A root-level SOUL.md that contains a private/personal runtime marker is forbidden and must not appear in the public repo.

forbidden_private_runtime.description: These files/directories are private runtime state and must never appear in the public repo at any path.
forbidden_private_runtime.note: Root-level SOUL.md is allowed only if it is the public ClawDoc persona (content matches origin/master tracking). USER.md, IDENTITY.md, TOOLS.md, and AGENTS.md at repo root are blocked by default — new public identity/user/tool templates should live under agent-template/, not repo root. The same filenames inside private directories (memory/, .agents/, .openclaw/) are private runtime and are forbidden.

skill_frontmatter.triggers_note: Trigger phrases must be embedded inline within the 'description' field, not as a separate 'triggers' frontmatter key.

validation_rules.install_mode_documentation: Both README.md and QUICKSTART.md must mention Mode 1 (persistent-agent) and Mode 2 (skills-only) install paths.
validation_rules.skill_count_accuracy: README.md and QUICKSTART.md must not claim 11 skills. The correct count is 22.

version_tracks.description: Two separate version tracks are maintained independently.
version_tracks.clawdoc_package_version: SemVer public package version (e.g. v1.6.0). Bumped for public install contract, new capabilities, or breaking changes.
version_tracks.tracked_openclaw_version: Upstream OpenClaw source/docs version (e.g. 2026.5.7). Updated on every sync; does not drive ClawDoc SemVer.
